description: '''Tango-rock''' is a [[fusion genre]] that developed within the [[Argentine rock]] scene of the late 1960s and early 1970s by incorporating influences from [[Tango music|tango]], the traditional musical style of [[Buenos Aires]]. Some of the musicians who consolidated the style, both as solo artists and in bands, include [[Litto Nebbia]], [[Luis Alberto Spinetta]], [[Moris (singer)|Moris]], [[Charly García]], Alejandro del Prado and [[Fito Páez]].
